What if such a simulator exists, and we're merely simulations within its grand design? Would that imply that our existence is not "real" but rather an intricate program designed by some higher entity?

Recently, I stumbled upon an intriguing concept in the realm of cognitive architectures – the idea that our brains are wired to recognize patterns, but also to recognize when we're stuck in patterns.
